notes: High-frequency Post-Entry tariff-rate priority matrix. This is the product/data-coverage target for daily duty-rate sync: every row must be covered by maintained duty rules, and source trust must match the declared expectation.

trust_tiers.official_exact: All displayed duty layers are official-backed for the maintained route / HS basis.
trust_tiers.official_duty_tax_estimate: Base customs duty is official-backed; VAT/GST/consumption-tax layers remain maintained estimates.
trust_tiers.mixed_official_estimate: Official base duty is present, but trade-remedy/add-on scope or local layers still require review.
trust_tiers.official_heading_only: Official source exists, but exact tariff-line or case scope can change the final payable rate.
trust_tiers.precheck_estimate: Maintained benchmark for screening only; final official tariff line still needs confirmation.
trust_tiers.official_link_estimate: Official tariff source is linked and monitored, but exact machine-readable tariff-line parsing is not complete yet.

automation_levels.official_auto: Daily updater can refresh official machine-readable duty data.
automation_levels.hybrid_official: Daily updater can promote unambiguous official candidates while keeping ambiguous prefixes exact-code gated.
automation_levels.benchmark_auto: Daily updater refreshes benchmark metadata and timestamps, but does not claim official machine-readable rates.
automation_levels.official_link_monitor: Daily updater refreshes official-source link metadata and benchmark tax math while exact machine-readable parsing remains pending.
